title: xerobotrys tomentosus
intro: Xerobotrys tomentosus, also known as the woolly false death cap, is a species of fungus in the family Agaricaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antifungal and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xerobotrys tomentosus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various infections, including skin and respiratory tract infections, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. Herbal preparations of Xerobotrys tomentosus can be made by infusing the dried fruiting bodies in hot water, which can be used as a tea to support immune function and overall well-being.
